description_long: This object is a rustic wooden advertising board, constructed from weathered planks and supported by two thick vertical posts. The front surface features two vintage-style 'WANTED' posters, one for Jesse James and another for Billy the Kid, both with reward information and black-and-white portraits. The wood has a rough, aged texture, with visible grain and some warping, giving it an authentic Old West appearance. The back of the board is plain, showing only the wooden planks without any posters or signage. The structure appears sturdy and is likely designed to be freestanding, suitable for outdoor placement. There are no visible illumination features or interactive components beyond the posters themselves.
description: A freestanding, weathered wooden advertising board with two vintage 'WANTED' posters on the front and a plain wooden back.
description_view_0: A side view showing the thickness of the wooden post and a glimpse of the board's edge.
description_view_1: The front view displays the full wooden board with two 'WANTED' posters attached, highlighting the main advertising surface.
description_view_2: The opposite side view, similar to view 0, shows the other supporting post and the board's edge.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals the plain wooden planks of the board, with no posters or signage visible.
attribute_mounting_type: freestanding, supported by two vertical wooden posts
attribute_frame_design: thick wooden border with rough, natural edges
attribute_advertisement_content: static printed 'WANTED' posters for historical outlaws
